title: Gluten-Free Canadian-Style Pan-Seared Aubergine
description: A flavorful and gluten-free dish featuring pan-seared aubergine, a staple of Canadian cuisine.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced aubergine and cook until browned on both sides, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Remove the aubergine from the skillet and set aside.
Reduce the heat to medium and add the minced garlic and sliced onion to the skillet.
Cook until the onion is translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the sliced baby bell pepper and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Stir in the diced tomatoes and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Return the aubergine to the skillet and season with salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the aubergine is coated with the tomato mixture.
Serve the aubergine hot, topped with gluten-free bread slices.
Optional: top with additional flavorful oil and fresh herbs, if desired.
